title: Virginity
writer: Frantisek Cáp, Marie Majerová, A.J. Urban
actors: Lída Baarová, Jaroslava Skorkovská, Frantisek Kreuzmann
plot: Young and stunningly beautiful Hana is thrown into the street after her mother catches her stepfather sexually harassing Hana. She finds a new job at a café where she becomes the object of lust for her new boss and the sleazy male...
